items.name: Understand-Anything
items.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

items.name: ai-engineering-from-scratch
items.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

items.name: knowledge-work-plugins
items.description: Open source repository of plugins primarily intended for knowledge workers to use in Claude Cowork

items.name: Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
items.description: 754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0

items.name: stop-slop
items.description: A skill file for removing AI tells from prose

items.name: taste-skill
items.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

items.name: codegraph
items.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode, AntiGravity, Kiro, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

items.name: skills
items.description: Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#
